title: Visualize actually remaining capacity in the workload widget
excerpt: We would like to display the remaining capacity in the workload widget, taking into account the progressing days of a week/hours of a day/weeks of a month. This would help us a lot to evaluate the actual remaining capaci…

posts.author: NicoMutert (Nico Mutert)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to display the remaining capacity in the workload widget, taking into account the progressing days of a week/hours of a day/weeks of a month. This would help us a lot to evaluate the actual remaining capacity of the respective employee and thus better control the distribution of tasks.
